GoldenSpyLevel.110101.3: Silent infiltration is the first lesson of the mission. Start by walking quietly through the garden's stone path.
GoldenSpyLevel.110102.3: Any noise may spook the koi. Tread carefully—the danger in the garden must not be awakened before its time.
GoldenSpyLevel.110201.3: Patrols are approaching. Move fast and leave no trace.
GoldenSpyLevel.110202.3: Security seems to have tightened. Stay focused to avoid all potential dangers.
GoldenSpyLevel.110301.3: The informant has brought new intel. Read it carefully before you set out.
GoldenSpyLevel.110302.3: What seems worthless could come in handy when the stakes are high.
GoldenSpyLevel.110401.3: The operation begins now. Retrieve the target's treasure before the banquet concludes.
